OKITASABER-HAORI_ASAGI.title: Asagi Haori of the Shinsengumi
OKITASABER-HAORI_ASAGI.description: #Whenever you play an Attack: gain 10 *Critical *Stars /(up to 3 times per turn/). Whenever one of your attacks crits: gain 20 *NP Charge. You start each combat with 6 *Breath.
OKITASABER-HAORI_ASAGI.flavor: The pale-blue haori of the First Unit's captain. To strike is to gather light; to crit is to spend it.
OKITASABER-BOND_FIRST_UNIT.title: Bond of the First Unit
OKITASABER-BOND_FIRST_UNIT.description: #Okita earns Bond points from combat victories (/+2, Elites /+3, Bosses /+5) and from entering events, shops and rest sites (/+1). Each *Bond* level grants permanent gifts: Max HP (Lv 1/3/6/9), starting *NP *Charge (Lv 2/5/8), starting *Critical *Stars (Lv 4/7, plus 1 *Breath at Lv 7) - and at Lv 10, Fight to the End: at the start of each combat, gain 1 *Guts.
OKITASABER-BOND_FIRST_UNIT.flavor: The captain who led from the front and never asked her unit to bleed alone. Her wish upon the Grail, made relic.
OKITASABER-MENKYO_KAIDEN.title: Menkyo Kaiden of the Tennen Rishin-ryū
OKITASABER-MENKYO_KAIDEN.description: #At card rewards you may give up the card to roll the gacha: 50% chance of a dupe, /+25% per failed roll. A dupe raises Okita's NP level (the counter, max 5), increasing her Noble Phantasm cards' power by 15% per level.
OKITASABER-MENKYO_KAIDEN.flavor: The full license of the Tennen Rishin-ryū, earned as a teenage prodigy. Mastery the sword remembers.
OKITASABER-THREE_COLOR_DANGO.title: Three-Color Dango
OKITASABER-THREE_COLOR_DANGO.description: #Gain 1 maximum *Breath. You start each combat with 2 additional *Breath.
OKITASABER-THREE_COLOR_DANGO.flavor: She loves sweets and children both. A skewer of dango buys a moment of peace before the killing.
OKITASABER-GUDAGUDA_POSTER.title: GUDAGUDA Poster with Nobu
OKITASABER-GUDAGUDA_POSTER.description: #The first time your *Breath reaches 0 each combat: gain 50 *Critical *Stars.
OKITASABER-GUDAGUDA_POSTER.flavor: The drama is glorious! Nobu insisted on top billing; Okita just wanted to be drawn holding a sword.
OKITASABER-KIKU_ICHIMONJI_NORIMUNE.title: Kiku-ichimonji Norimune
OKITASABER-KIKU_ICHIMONJI_NORIMUNE.flavo: Her blade, signed with the imperial chrysanthemum. It cuts the way she does: cleanly, and once.
OKITASABER-SAKURA_PETALS.title: Sakura Petals
OKITASABER-SAKURA_PETALS.description: #At the start of each combat, gain 30 *Critical *Stars.
OKITASABER-SAKURA_PETALS.flavor: Petals on the wind of the last spring she would ever see. A third of the way to a *Critical, given freely.
OKITASABER-DR_MATSUMOTO_MEDICINE.title: Dr. Matsumoto's Medicine
OKITASABER-DR_MATSUMOTO_MEDICINE.descrip: #The first *Cough you hold each combat is treated: gain 20 *NP Charge.
OKITASABER-DR_MATSUMOTO_MEDICINE.flavor: Ryojun Matsumoto did what he could for a girl the disease had already claimed. He turned her cough into fuel.
OKITASABER-MAKOTO_BANNER.title: Makoto Banner
OKITASABER-MAKOTO_BANNER.description: #Each time your 100 *Critical *Star threshold triggers: gain 10 *NP Charge and draw 1 card.
OKITASABER-MAKOTO_BANNER.flavor: The single character 誠 - Sincerity - that the Shinsengumi carried into every fight. Hers to the end.
OKITASABER-FIRST_UNIT_BADGE.title: First Unit Badge
OKITASABER-FIRST_UNIT_BADGE.description: #At the start of Elite and Boss combats: gain 20 *Critical *Stars and 2 *Breath.
OKITASABER-FIRST_UNIT_BADGE.flavor: The mark of the First Unit's captain. Against the strong, she breathes deepest and strikes fastest.
OKITASABER-FLOWER_OF_IMPERIAL_CAPITAL.de: #Replaces your Asagi Haori, doubling both conversions: whenever you play an Attack, gain 20 *Critical *Stars /(up to 3 times per turn/); whenever one of your attacks crits, gain 40 *NP Charge.
OKITASABER-FLOWER_OF_IMPERIAL_CAPITAL.fl: The bloom of a capital that never was. Her legend, overgrown into something twice as bright and twice as deadly.
OKITASABER-HOLY_GRAIL_IMPERIAL_CAPITAL.t: Holy Grail of the Imperial Capital
OKITASABER-HOLY_GRAIL_IMPERIAL_CAPITAL.d: #Palingenesis: gain !MaxHp! Max HP. While held, limits break: Bond can reach level 12 and NP level can reach 6.
OKITASABER-HOLY_GRAIL_IMPERIAL_CAPITAL.f: From the Strange Tale of the Imperial Capital Grail War - her Grail, and her chance to fight to the very end.
